languages.text: {n}Меровцы хватаются за оружие. Даже раньше у них был мизерный шанс одолеть вас, но теперь, когда все их боевые приемы вам известны, эта стычка не сложнее дворянской охоты.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Меровцы хватаются за оружие. Даже раньше у них был мизерный шанс одолеть вас, но теперь, когда все их боевые приемы вам известны, эта стычка не сложнее дворянской охоты.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Меровцы хватаются за оружие. Даже раньше у них был мизерный шанс одолеть вас, но теперь, когда все их боевые приемы вам известны, эта стычка не сложнее дворянской охоты.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}

{n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫人抓起了武器。他们击败你的机会本就微乎其微，更何况现在你已摸清他们的战斗套路。这场战斗对你来说，就像参加一场轻松的狩猎派对。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}梅罗夫人抓起了武器。他们击败你的机会本就微乎其微，更何况现在你已摸清他们的战斗套路。这场战斗对你来说，就像参加一场轻松的狩猎派对。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens saisissent leurs armes. Ils n'avaient que peu de chances de vous vaincre auparavant, mais maintenant que vous connaissez toutes leurs techniques, ce combat ne sera pas plus difficile pour vous qu'une partie de chasse distinguée.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les Meroviens saisissent leurs armes. Ils n'avaient que peu de chances de vous vaincre auparavant, mais maintenant que vous connaissez toutes leurs techniques, ce combat ne sera pas plus difficile pour vous qu'une partie de chasse distinguée.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Merovlular silahlarına sarılıyor. Eskiden seni yenme şansları pek yoktu, şimdiyse tüm dövüş tekniklerini bildiğinden verdiğin av partilerinde olduğu kadar bile yorulmayacağını biliyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Merovlular silahlarına sarılıyor. Eskiden seni yenme şansları pek yoktu, şimdiyse tüm dövüş tekniklerini bildiğinden verdiğin av partilerinde olduğu kadar bile yorulmayacağını biliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los merovianos empuñan sus armas. Si antes ya tenían pocas oportunidades de derrotarte, ahora que conoces sus técnicas esto será tan difícil como una cacería amistosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los merovianos empuñan sus armas. Si antes ya tenían pocas oportunidades de derrotarte, ahora que conoces sus técnicas esto será tan difícil como una cacería amistosa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Merovianer greifen nach ihren Waffen. Einst waren ihre Chancen, dich zu besiegen, gering, aber nun, da du alle ihre Kampftechniken kennst, gleicht der Kampf eher einer vornehmen Jagdgesellschaft.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Merovianer greifen nach ihren Waffen. Einst waren ihre Chancen, dich zu besiegen, gering, aber nun, da du alle ihre Kampftechniken kennst, gleicht der Kampf eher einer vornehmen Jagdgesellschaft.{/n}

languages.text: {n}メロヴィング朝は武器を手にした。以前は君を倒す確率は低かったが、君が彼らの戦術を全て知った今、これは紳士的な狩猟旅行と変わらないだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians grab their weapons. Before, their chances of defeating you were slim, but now that you know all their fighting techniques, this will be no more taxing than a genteel hunting party.{/n}
